arts.ttl: I know just how important Phil Foden is to Man City, says boss Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: The England international is yet to start a Premier League game this season.

arts.ttl: Chelsea supporters are fetching the world's smallest violin to serenade Man City fans as Cole Palmer continues to make mockery of £40m price tag... with star midfielder now compared to Arsenal legend
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL AT STAMFORD BRIDGE: There is some confusion over where you'll find the world's smallest violin. But that's what Chelsea fans have fetched to serenade Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Foden mystery, Haaland doubt, injury crisis - Man City are in unchartered territory after Rodri blow
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola is not looking for excuses despite his Manchester City injury problems - but things are not quite right at the Etihad going into their first Champions League trip of the season.

arts.ttl: SPORTS AGENDA: Arsenal exec has form for snubbing Man City, Alexander Ceferin's salary fuels his commitment to UEFA... and EFL cyber attack claims another victim
arts.sum: MIKE KEEGAN: Tim Lewis's apparently-petulant storming out of the directors' box at the Etihad Stadium is not the first time he has raised eyebrows in Manchester with a hasty departure.

arts.ttl: 'I swear': Arsenal star shocked after Jack Grealish says he runs with the ball like de Bruyne
Liverpool superstar a SHOCK target for ex-Man City rival
arts.sum: Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson has emerged as a target for Bayern Munich, according to a sensational report. Despite being at peak age for a goalkeeper, Liverpool have already signed a successor to the 31-year-old.
